scope: Canonical recipe persistence, stage ordering, pixel reset and deterministic repeated Worker output.

rejected: Recipe drift: JSON serialization followed by fail-closed hydration re-encodes byte-for-byte identically.
Stage reordering: the real Worker reports chroma, crop, resize, quantize in the canonical order.
Nondeterministic repeat: a second real Worker run matches pixels and operation metadata.
Reset leakage: reset removes the fixed palette and disables resize/quantize while preserving earlier stages.
Transfer omission: the full request source buffer is detached after Worker transfer.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: Results state and export packaging remain G6/G7; complete editor rollup remains G8.
